# yamlnode

```go
import "github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/internal/yamlnode"
```

Package yamlnode provides read\-mostly query and navigation helpers over gopkg.in/yaml.v3 node trees, shared by the editor's editing flow and its validators. All functions treat nil or wrong\-kind nodes as "absent" rather than panicking.

## Index

- [func ChildByKey\(mapping \*yaml.Node, key string\) \*yaml.Node](<#ChildByKey>)
- [func CloneNode\(n \*yaml.Node\) \*yaml.Node](<#CloneNode>)

- [func JoinPath\(prefix, key string\) string](<#JoinPath>)
- [func Navigate\(node \*yaml.Node, segs \[\]string, path string, onArrival func\(node \*yaml.Node, path string\)\)](<#Navigate>)
- [func NodeAtPath\(node \*yaml.Node, segs \[\]string\) \*yaml.Node](<#NodeAtPath>)
- [func PresentNonEmpty\(node \*yaml.Node\) bool](<#PresentNonEmpty>)
- [func RootMapping\(raw \[\]byte\) \(\*yaml.Node, bool\)](<#RootMapping>)
- [func ScalarAt\(node \*yaml.Node, segs \[\]string\) string](<#ScalarAt>)
- [func ScalarChild\(node \*yaml.Node, key string\) string](<#ScalarChild>)


<a name="ChildByKey"></a>
## func [ChildByKey](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L10>)

```go
func ChildByKey(mapping *yaml.Node, key string) *yaml.Node
```

ChildByKey returns the value node mapped to key in a MappingNode, or nil.

<a name="CloneNode"></a>
## func [CloneNode](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L83>)

```go
func CloneNode(n *yaml.Node) *yaml.Node
```

CloneNode returns a deep copy of n so a snapshot can be mutated independently of the live tree. Returns nil for a nil input.

<a name="ForEachLeaf"></a>
## func [ForEachLeaf](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/walk.go#L46>)

```go
func ForEachLeaf(root *yaml.Node, path string, fn func(node *yaml.Node, where string))
```

ForEachLeaf calls fn with every node reached by the dotted path and its full expanded path. Sequences are expanded at every level, and \- once at least one segment has matched \- a missing segment falls back to dict\-of\-structs descent \(every mapping value is searched\), mirroring Navigate. The leaf node is delivered as\-is \(scalar, sequence, or mapping\); fn never receives nil \- absent paths simply produce no calls.

<a name="JoinPath"></a>
## func [JoinPath](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L74>)

```go
func JoinPath(prefix, key string) string
```

JoinPath joins a dot\-separated prefix with a key, omitting the dot when the prefix is empty.

<a name="Navigate"></a>
## func [Navigate](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/walk.go#L13>)

```go
func Navigate(node *yaml.Node, segs []string, path string, onArrival func(node *yaml.Node, path string))
```

Navigate traverses node following segs, expanding sequences and dict\-of\-structs automatically. onArrival is called with the reached node and its expanded dot/index path when segs is exhausted.

<a name="NodeAtPath"></a>
## func [NodeAtPath](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L24>)

```go
func NodeAtPath(node *yaml.Node, segs []string) *yaml.Node
```

NodeAtPath navigates node following string segs and returns the terminal node. Returns nil when the path does not exist.

<a name="PresentNonEmpty"></a>
## func [PresentNonEmpty](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L54>)

```go
func PresentNonEmpty(node *yaml.Node) bool
```

PresentNonEmpty reports whether node exists and is not an empty/null scalar. Mappings and sequences count as present even when empty.

<a name="RootMapping"></a>
## func [RootMapping](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L61>)

```go
func RootMapping(raw []byte) (*yaml.Node, bool)
```

RootMapping unmarshals raw and returns its root node. An empty document yields an empty mapping \(so unconditional checks still run\); invalid YAML yields ok=false.

<a name="ScalarAt"></a>
## func [ScalarAt](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L34>)

```go
func ScalarAt(node *yaml.Node, segs []string) string
```

ScalarAt navigates node following segs and returns the scalar value at the terminal node. Returns "" when the path does not exist or the terminal node is not a scalar.

<a name="ScalarChild"></a>
## func [ScalarChild](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/yedit/blob/main/internal/yamlnode/yamlnode.go#L44>)

```go
func ScalarChild(node *yaml.Node, key string) string
```

ScalarChild returns the scalar value of mapping node's direct key, or "" when the key is absent or its value is not a scalar.
